penalties.detail: largest cycle holds 3/387 declarations (+3 in smaller cycles)
7% of declaration weight has no edges

layers.name: CLI & Orchestration
layers.summary_zh: 命令行入口与各阶段编排（analyze / serve / score / overlay / incremental / invariants）
layers.summary_en: CLI entry points that orchestrate each pipeline phase

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: 端到端构建管线的入口编排器,解析参数、遍历项目、按语言运行各提取器、构图分层、发现调用流并将完整结构写入 raw_structure.json 及辅助报告。
classes.description_en: End-to-end build orchestrator that parses args, walks the project, runs per-language extractors, builds and layers the graph, discovers flows, and writes raw_structure.json plus its companion reports.

classes.name: plan
classes.signature: function plan(root, prev, architectureExists, currentVersion = null, maxChangeRatio = DEFAULT_MAX_CHANGE_RATIO)

classes.name: merge
classes.description_zh: 将上一次构建的 Phase-2 标注(描述、标签、core、流程图)按未变更文件复用合并到新生成的 Phase-1 结构上,并把受改动影响的声明与流标记为需复审。
classes.description_en: Merges prior Phase-2 annotations (descriptions, tags, core flags, diagrams) from the previous build onto a fresh Phase-1 structure for unchanged files, flagging change-affected declarations and flows for re-review.

classes.name: planMain
classes.description_zh: 增量构建的规划命令,依据 git diff 判定全量还是增量重建并将决策(模式、原因、变更文件)写入 incremental.json。
classes.description_en: CLI entry that plans the build by deciding full-vs-incremental from the git diff and writes the decision (mode, reason, changed files) to incremental.json.

classes.name: mergeMain
classes.description_zh: 增量合并命令,加载新 raw_structure、上一版 map 与规划结果,调用 merge 产出草稿 map 并汇报多少声明缺描述、多少流需复审。
classes.description_en: CLI entry that loads the fresh raw structure, prior map, and plan, runs merge to emit a draft map, and reports how many declarations lack descriptions and flows need review.

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: 构建后的不变量校验闸门命令,对 map 运行 INV-1/INV-U1 分层不变量与 INV-B1 双语完整性检查,任一违例即返回非零退出码使构建失败。
classes.description_en: Post-build invariant-gate command that runs the INV-1/INV-U1 layering and INV-B1 bilingual-completeness checks over a map, returning a non-zero exit code on any violation to fail the build.

classes.name: runMain
classes.description_zh: /code-map:run 的实现,以分离进程后台启动 serve.mjs 静态服务器、轮询其状态文件确认就绪后打开浏览器,并复用已在运行的实例。
classes.description_en: Implements /code-map:run by launching serve.mjs as a detached background server, polling its state file until ready, then opening the browser, reusing an already-running instance if present.

classes.name: stopServer
classes.description_zh: 无控制台输出的纯服务器停止例程,读取状态文件向记录的 PID 发送 SIGTERM 并等待退出,供 stop 命令与 SessionEnd 钩子共用。
classes.description_en: Console-silent server-stop routine that reads the state file, sends SIGTERM to the recorded PID and waits for exit, shared by the stop command and the SessionEnd hook.

classes.name: shouldAutoStop
classes.signature: function shouldAutoStop({ reason, keepAliveEnv, keepAliveFile, serverAlive })

classes.name: sessionEndMain
classes.description_zh: Claude Code 退出时由 SessionEnd 钩子调用的处理器,解析会话结束载荷并依据保活设置决定是否静默自动停止后台服务器。
classes.description_en: SessionEnd-hook handler invoked when Claude Code exits, parsing the session-end payload and deciding via keep-alive settings whether to silently auto-stop the background server.

classes.name: runServer
classes.description_zh: 零依赖的本地静态 HTTP 服务器,在自动选取的空闲端口上托管 viewer 资源并按相对路径供给 code-map.json,可选 dev 实时重载与状态文件记录。
classes.description_en: Dependency-free local static HTTP server that hosts the viewer assets on an auto-picked free port and serves code-map.json over relative paths, with optional dev live-reload and state-file recording.

layers.name: Flow Discovery
layers.summary_zh: 从依赖图发现候选业务流程并播种为可出图的链路
layers.summary_en: Discovers candidate business flows from the dependency graph

classes.name: shortName
classes.description_zh: 把任意语言的超类型/引用字符串归一化为短名(剥去泛型与调用括号、取分隔符末段),使派发索引能跨语言地按命名匹配接口与实现。
classes.description_en: Normalizes any-language supertype/reference strings to a bare short-name (stripping generics and call parens, taking the last path segment) so the dispatch index can match interfaces to implementors language-agnostically.

classes.name: buildDispatchIndex
classes.description_zh: 从声明的 supertypes 字符串(而非已被解析丢弃的 extends 边)构建「接口短名 → 实现声明数组」索引,仅保留有 ≥2 个实现者的多态分派点,为流追踪在接口处的分支扩展提供依据。
classes.description_en: Builds the polymorphic-dispatch index mapping each interface short-name to its implementor declarations (sourced from raw supertype strings rather than resolution-dropped extends edges), keeping only types with two or more implementors so flow tracing can branch at interfaces.

classes.name: traceFlow
classes.signature: function traceFlow(seed, adjacency, hubIds, maxDepth = 6, ctx = null, maxNodes = Infinity)
classes.description_zh: 从单个种子出发对 uses 邻接表做前向 BFS,把图 hub 当作叶子(除非属于种子所在子系统则向内穿透),并在节点的接口引用处经派发索引扇出到实现者,产出一条候选流的有序节点、边与被截断记录。
classes.description_en: Performs the forward BFS from a single seed over uses-adjacency that produces one candidate flow's ordered nodes and edges, treating hubs as leaves (except when they share the seed's subsystem, where it penetrates inward) and fanning out at interface references to implementors via the dispatch index.

classes.name: buildFlows
classes.signature: function buildFlows(seeds, declarations, edges, hubIds, maxDepth = 6, opts = {})

classes.name: buildDispatchFlows
classes.signature: function buildDispatchFlows(declarations, dispatchIndex, edges, hubIds, opts = {})
classes.description_zh: 为每个显著的多态分派接口生成一条聚焦的确定性「分派流」:以引用该接口、非实现者、出度最高的规范调度器为根,深度二扇出到全部实现者及其直接非 hub 协作者,刻画前向 BFS 在稠密代码库中无法呈现的责任链/策略/中间件形态。
classes.description_en: Generates one focused, deterministic dispatch flow per significant polymorphic interface, rooted at its canonical dispatcher (a non-implementor referencing the interface with the highest out-degree) and fanning out depth-two to all implementors plus their direct non-hub collaborators, capturing the chain-of-responsibility/strategy/middleware shape that plain forward-BFS cannot in densely connected libraries.

layers.name: Architecture & Scoring
layers.summary_zh: 模板、分层、YAML、跳目录、厂商剔除、用户覆盖、架构评分
layers.summary_en: Templates, layer assignment, YAML, skip-dirs, vendoring, user overlay, scoring

classes.name: applyMain
classes.description_zh: overlay CLI 的 apply 子命令:读取新构建的地图与用户 overlay,调用 applyOverlay 重新对账并落盘,空 overlay 时按恒等处理不写文件。
classes.description_en: The overlay CLI's `apply` subcommand: loads the freshly built map plus the user overlay, reconciles and writes both back via applyOverlay, treating an empty overlay as a no-op identity.

classes.name: listMain
classes.description_zh: overlay CLI 的 list 子命令:逐行打印 overlay 各条目的 id/状态/类型/请求,为 /code-map:chat 的查看功能提供后端。
classes.description_en: The overlay CLI's `list` subcommand: prints each overlay entry's id, status, type and request, backing /code-map:chat's inspection of persisted edits.

classes.name: removeMain
classes.description_zh: overlay CLI 的 remove 子命令:按 id 从 overlay 文件中删除一条用户编辑并回写,为 /code-map:chat 的撤销功能提供后端。
classes.description_en: The overlay CLI's `remove` subcommand: deletes one user edit by id from the overlay file and writes it back, backing /code-map:chat's undo.

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: overlay CLI 的入口分发器:把首个参数解析为 apply/list/remove 并路由到对应子命令,未知动作时报错退出。
classes.description_en: The overlay CLI entry dispatcher: parses the first argument as apply/list/remove and routes to the matching subcommand, erroring on an unknown action.

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: score CLI 的入口:读取 code-map.json,计算确定性架构评分,可选施加有界的 AI 修正(--adjust)并将结果写入 project.score 或打印明细。
classes.description_en: The score CLI entry: reads code-map.json, computes the deterministic architecture score, optionally applies the bounded AI adjustment (--adjust), and writes it to project.score or prints the breakdown.

classes.name: loadConfig
classes.description_zh: 分层配置的三级解析器:优先采用 AI Phase 0 的 architecture.yml,其次按信号检测选模板,最后回退到内置默认配置,并保证存在 uncategorized 层。
classes.description_en: The three-tier layer-config resolver: prefers the AI Phase 0 architecture.yml, falls back to signal-detected template selection, then to the embedded default config, always ensuring an `uncategorized` layer exists.

classes.name: entryRefsAlive
classes.description_zh: overlay 对账的存活判定:检查某条编辑(分层移动/描述/流程)所引用的声明、层和流程节点是否仍存在于新地图中,未知类型按失效处理。
classes.description_en: The overlay reconciliation liveness check: tests whether a given edit's referenced declarations, layers and flow nodes still exist in the fresh map, failing closed on unknown entry types.

classes.name: applyOverlay
classes.description_zh: 用户 overlay 的核心引擎:克隆新地图,逐条对账(失效转 inactive、复活转 active),把活跃编辑接地施加并去重,返回新地图、回写的 overlay 与报告。
classes.description_en: The core user-overlay engine: clones the fresh map, reconciles each entry (dead refs suspended, returned refs reactivated), applies the active edits grounded and deduped, returning the new map, rewritten overlay and a report.

classes.name: scoreLayering
classes.description_zh: 评分 L 维度(分层合理性):按未分类占比、最大层失衡、空层数量、以及跨层向上 uses 边违例打分,豁免 extends 边与指向 api 层的边。
classes.description_en: Scores the L dimension (layering sanity): penalizes uncategorized share, monolayer imbalance, empty layers, and upward cross-layer `uses` edges, exempting `extends` and edges into an `api`-flagged layer.

classes.name: scoreDependencies
classes.description_zh: 评分 Dq 维度(依赖清晰度):用 Tarjan 检测环结(以最大 SCC 为架构核心加权),并叠加传递可达密度、度数集中、导入解析覆盖率与动态语言不透明度惩罚。
classes.description_en: Scores the Dq dimension (dependency clarity): detects cycle tangles via Tarjan (weighting the largest SCC as the architectural core), plus reach density, degree concentration, import-resolution coverage and dynamic-language opacity penalties.

classes.name: scoreHygiene
classes.description_zh: 评分 H 维度(仓库卫生度):按解析失败率、vendored 泛滥告警数、零度孤立声明的加权占比、以及超大单元占比打分。
classes.description_en: Scores the H dimension (repo hygiene): penalizes parse-failure rate, vendored-flooding advisories, the kind-weighted share of zero-degree isolated declarations, and oversized units.

classes.name: computeScore
classes.description_zh: 确定性架构评分总入口:由难度门控 D(规模/语言对数,封顶 90)乘以执行质量 E(L/Dq/H 加权)得出 total=round(D×E),输出字节稳定、无时间戳。
classes.description_en: The top-level deterministic scorer: multiplies the difficulty gate D (log scale/languages, capped at 90) by execution quality E (weighted L/Dq/H) to yield total = round(D × E), with byte-stable, timestamp-free output.

classes.name: loadSkipDirs
classes.description_zh: 跳过目录列表的解析器:合并内置默认、CLI 额外项与项目 .code-map/skip-dirs.txt(支持以 `-` 前缀移除),供裁剪测试/vendored 目录使用。
classes.description_en: Resolves the skip-dirs set by merging built-in defaults, CLI extras and the project's .code-map/skip-dirs.txt (with `-` prefix removals), used to prune test/vendored directories.

classes.name: loadTemplates
classes.description_zh: 从插件 templates/ 目录加载所有内置架构模板 YAML,校验含 id 与 layers 字段并补全 signals,返回供检测与分层种子化使用的模板列表。
classes.description_en: Loads all bundled architecture-template YAMLs from the plugin's templates/ directory, validating each has id and layers and defaulting signals, returning the template list used for detection and layer seeding.

classes.name: detectTemplate
classes.description_zh: 信号检测引擎:依据项目清单文件、依赖与目录路径对每个模板的 files/dependencies/paths 信号打分,选出最契合的架构形状(clean-architecture 为并列时的优先项)。
classes.description_en: The signal-detection engine: scores each template's files/dependencies/paths signals against the project's manifests, dependencies and directory paths, choosing the best-fitting architecture shape (clean-architecture preferred on ties).

classes.name: detectVendoredDirs
classes.description_zh: vendored 泛滥探测:按声明所在顶层目录与包根聚合,标记声明数大且外来包占比超阈值的目录并按数量排序,生成会污染地图的第三方子树告警。
classes.description_en: Detects vendored flooding: aggregates declarations by top-level dir and package root, flags dirs that are large and dominated by packages outside the project's own roots, emitting count-sorted advisories for map-polluting third-party subtrees.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: 极简无依赖 YAML 解析器的入口:剥注释、合并多行流式集合,再按缩进解析出代码地图自有 YAML(模板与 architecture.yml)的根值。
classes.description_en: The entry point of the minimal dependency-free YAML reader: strips comments, merges multi-line flow collections, then indent-parses the root value of code-map's own YAML (templates and architecture.yml).

classes.name: parseSequence
classes.description_zh: YAML 块序列解析子程序:逐项消费同缩进的 `- ` 条目,处理嵌套块、流式集合及内联映射条目,返回数组与下一行索引。
classes.description_en: The YAML block-sequence sub-parser: consumes same-indent `- ` items, handling nested blocks, flow collections and inline map entries, returning the array and next line index.

classes.name: parseMapping
classes.description_zh: YAML 块映射解析子程序:逐对消费同缩进的 key: value 条目,递归处理更深缩进或同缩进的嵌套块/序列,返回对象与下一行索引。
classes.description_en: The YAML block-mapping sub-parser: consumes same-indent `key: value` pairs, recursing into deeper- or same-indent nested blocks/sequences, returning the object and next line index.

classes.name: parseScalar
classes.description_zh: YAML 标量解析子程序:把单个标量串识别为流式序列/映射、双引号字符串、整数、浮点、布尔、null 或裸字符串。
classes.description_en: The YAML scalar sub-parser: coerces a single scalar token into a flow sequence/mapping, double-quoted string, integer, float, boolean, null or bare string.

layers.name: Parsing & Resolution
layers.summary_zh: 多语言 tree-sitter 抽取器、语法装载、模块/导入解析
layers.summary_en: Per-language tree-sitter extractors, grammar loading, module resolution

classes.name: unmarshalCaptures
classes.signature: function unmarshalCaptures(query, tree, address, patternIndex, result)

classes.name: parseIsPredicate
classes.signature: function parseIsPredicate(steps, index, operator, assertedProperties, refutedProperties)

classes.name: parsePattern
classes.signature: function parsePattern(index, stepType, stepValueId, captureNames, stringValues, steps, textPredicates, predicates, setProperties, assertedProperties, refutedProperties)

classes.name: resolveGrammarWasm
classes.description_zh: 把语法名解析成其 tree-sitter wasm 的绝对路径:内置语法直接走仓库路径,远程语法首次使用时按 sha256 校验后下载并缓存,离线且未缓存时抛 GrammarUnavailable 让调用方把文件降级到 unresolved 而非崩溃。
classes.description_en: Resolves a grammar name to its tree-sitter wasm absolute path—bundled grammars use the repo path, remote ones are fetched+sha256-verified+cached on first use, and offline-uncached cases throw GrammarUnavailable so callers route the file to unresolved rather than crash.

classes.name: init
classes.description_zh: 惰性、单次地初始化 vendored web-tree-sitter 运行时(用 locateFile 定位 wasm),返回缓存的 Promise 作为所有解析的前置门。
classes.description_en: Lazily and idempotently initializes the vendored web-tree-sitter runtime (pointing locateFile at the bundled wasm), returning a cached promise that gates all parsing.

classes.name: loadLanguage
classes.description_zh: 按清单名加载并缓存 tree-sitter Language(解析 wasm 路径、读字节、Language.load),为各语言抽取器提供其语法对象。
classes.description_en: Loads and memoizes a tree-sitter Language by manifest name (resolve wasm path, read bytes, Language.load), giving each extractor its grammar object.

classes.name: makeQuery
classes.description_zh: 用现代非弃用 API 为给定语法和查询源构造 tree-sitter Query,让抽取器一次性编译声明/导入捕获模式。
classes.description_en: Builds a tree-sitter Query from a grammar and query source via the modern (non-deprecated) API, so extractors compile their declaration/import capture patterns once.

classes.name: textOf
classes.description_zh: 返回节点已正确解码的源文本(node.text),作为所有抽取器统一的取文本入口,避开 UTF-16 偏移切片的坑。
classes.description_en: Returns a node's correctly-decoded source text (node.text), the single text-access helper every extractor uses to sidestep UTF-16 offset slicing pitfalls.

classes.name: orderedIdentifiers
classes.description_zh: 按文档顺序收集节点子树下的标识符叶子名(到 limit 为止),用于从 macro_type_specifier/argument_list 里恢复函数式宏定义中隐藏的真实名字。
classes.description_en: Collects identifier-like leaf names under a node in document order (up to a limit), used to recover the real names hidden inside macro_type_specifier/argument_list of function-style-macro definitions.

classes.name: macroFnFromDef
classes.description_zh: 恢复被解析成无名 function_definition 的函数式宏定义(变体 A):从 macro_type_specifier 取第二个标识符作函数名、配对 compound_statement 作函数体,返回 {name, body} 或 null。
classes.description_en: Recovers a function-style-macro definition parsed as a nameless function_definition (variant A), taking the second identifier in the macro_type_specifier as the function name and the compound_statement as the body, returning {name, body} or null.

classes.name: macroFnFromCall
classes.description_zh: 恢复被解析成『裸宏调用 + 紧随代码块』的函数式宏定义(变体 B,仅文件作用域合法):取调用首个实参作函数名,返回 {name, body, call} 或 null。
classes.description_en: Recovers a function-style-macro definition parsed as a bare macro call immediately followed by a block (variant B, only legal at file scope), taking the call's first argument as the function name and returning {name, body, call} or null.

classes.name: tailName
classes.description_zh: 取(可能带点/作用域的)引用节点的尾部标识符名,用于把成员/限定调用归约为短名以建调用边。
classes.description_en: Extracts the trailing identifier of a (possibly dotted/qualified) reference node, reducing member/qualified calls to a short name for call-edge building.

classes.name: hasErrorIn
classes.description_zh: 判断节点子树是否含 ERROR 或 MISSING,让抽取器在名字被 tree-sitter 错误恢复污染时把该声明跳过并审计。
classes.description_en: Tests whether a node's subtree contains any ERROR or MISSING, so extractors skip+audit a declaration whose name was corrupted by tree-sitter error recovery.

classes.name: locOf
classes.description_zh: 按起止行计算节点跨越的代码行数(1 起含端点),作为每个声明的 loc 度量。
classes.description_en: Computes a node's spanned lines of code from its start/end rows (1-indexed inclusive), feeding each declaration's loc metric.

classes.name: signatureOf
classes.description_zh: 取函数节点到其函数体之前的头部文本并折叠空白,生成统一的签名字符串。
classes.description_en: Takes a function node's header up to its body and collapses whitespace to produce a normalized signature string.

classes.name: countMethods
classes.description_zh: 统计类节点体内直接的方法定义数量(按给定 body/method 节点类型),为类型声明填 method_count。
classes.description_en: Counts method definitions directly inside a class node's body (per given body/method node types), populating a type declaration's method_count.

classes.name: Declaration
classes.description_zh: 声明对象的工厂,把语言无关的声明字段(name/namespace/kind/path/line/refs/visibility/loc/signature 等)归一成框架后续处理与序列化的统一形状。
classes.description_en: Factory for a declaration object that normalizes the language-agnostic fields (name/namespace/kind/path/line/refs/visibility/loc/signature, etc.) into the uniform shape the framework later annotates and serializes.

classes.name: qualifiedName
classes.description_zh: 由 namespace 与 name 组合出全限定名(有命名空间则 `ns.name`,否则裸名),是声明在图中的稳定标识。
classes.description_en: Composes a declaration's fully-qualified name from namespace+name (`ns.name` if namespaced, else bare), the stable identity used across the graph.

classes.name: ImportSpec
classes.signature: function ImportSpec(raw, qualified = null, alias = null, bindings = [])
classes.description_zh: 导入语句的轻量记录(原始说明符、限定形式、别名、绑定列表),由各抽取器产出供模块解析消费。
classes.description_en: Lightweight record of an import statement (raw specifier, qualified form, alias, bindings) emitted by extractors for module resolution to consume.

classes.name: ReexportSpec
classes.signature: function ReexportSpec(source, names = [], star = false, alias = null)
classes.description_zh: 再导出/桶文件语句的记录(来源、具名转出、是否 star、别名),供 TS 解析做透传桶展开。
classes.description_en: Record of a re-export/barrel statement (source, named exports, star flag, alias) consumed by TS resolution for transitive barrel expansion.

classes.name: ParseResult
classes.description_zh: 单文件抽取的聚合结果(declarations/imports/skipped/reexports),是所有抽取器 parse 的统一返回契约。
classes.description_en: Aggregate per-file extraction result (declarations/imports/skipped/reexports), the uniform return contract of every extractor's parse.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: C 抽取器入口:递归穿透 preproc 条件块、linkage_specification 与 ERROR 等『透明』容器以恢复被条件编译/错误恢复吞掉的结构体/联合/枚举/typedef/函数,并通过 macroFnFromDef/FromCall 复活函数式宏定义,按(kind,限定名,签名)去重 #if/#else 分支重名。
classes.description_en: C extractor entry: recurses through 'transparent' containers (preproc conditionals, linkage_specification, ERROR) to recover structs/unions/enums/typedefs/functions swallowed by conditional compilation or error recovery, revives function-style-macro definitions via macroFnFromDef/FromCall, and dedups #if/#else twin definitions by (kind, qualified name, signature).

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: C++ 抽取器入口:在 C 的 preproc/ERROR 透明穿透与宏定义恢复之上,额外沿 namespace_definition 维护命名空间栈给声明加限定前缀,并把 new_expression 计入引用。
classes.description_en: C++ extractor entry: on top of C's transparent preproc/ERROR descent and macro-definition recovery, it also threads a namespace stack through namespace_definition to qualify declarations and counts new_expression as a reference.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: C# 抽取器入口:从 using 指令收集导入,沿 namespace 节点(文件作用域取直接子节点、块作用域取 declaration_list)递归构造命名空间,抽取类/接口/枚举/结构体及嵌套类型并计方法数。
classes.description_en: C# extractor entry: collects imports from using-directives, recurses namespaces (file-scoped namespaces hold members as direct children, block-scoped ones in a declaration_list) to build qualified names, and extracts classes/interfaces/enums/structs plus nested types with method counts.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: Dart 抽取器入口:从 import 指令的 uri 收集依赖,抽取 class/mixin/enum/extension 类型,并把 function_signature 与其后续兄弟 function_body 折叠成顶层函数声明。
classes.description_en: Dart extractor entry: gathers deps from import-directive URIs, extracts class/mixin/enum/extension types, and folds a function_signature together with its following function_body sibling into a top-level function declaration.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: Go 抽取器入口:由目录加 package 子句合成命名空间,把方法身份绑到接收者类型(避免同包同名方法碰撞),按首字母大小写判断导出可见性,并把外部方法回填到结构体的 method_count。
classes.description_en: Go extractor entry: composes namespace from directory+package clause, keys a method's identity to its receiver type (avoiding same-package same-name collisions), infers exported visibility from leading-capital naming, and back-fills out-of-type methods into a struct's method_count.

classes.name: extractorPathFor
classes.description_zh: 在抽取器注册表中按文件扩展名查出对应语言模块的相对路径,无匹配返回 null。
classes.description_en: Looks up the registry to map a file extension to its language extractor module path, returning null when nothing matches.

classes.name: loadExtractor
classes.description_zh: 按注册路径惰性 import 抽取器模块并缓存结果,模块缺失或其语法不可用时返回 null(文件转入 unresolved)而非让框架崩溃。
classes.description_en: Lazily imports an extractor module by its registry path and caches the result, returning null (the file goes to unresolved) instead of crashing the framework when the module is missing or its grammar is unavailable.

classes.name: extractorFor
classes.description_zh: 扩展名→抽取器的统一调度入口:先解析扩展名对应路径再惰性加载该抽取器,串起注册表查找与按需加载。
classes.description_en: The extension→extractor dispatch entry: resolves the extension's module path then lazily loads that extractor, chaining registry lookup with on-demand loading.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: Java 抽取器入口:取 package 子句作命名空间、收集 import,抽取类/接口/枚举声明及其继承超类型,并在各种类体节点内统计方法数。
classes.description_en: Java extractor entry: takes the package clause as namespace, collects imports, extracts class/interface/enum declarations with their inherited supertypes, and counts methods inside the various class-body node types.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: Kotlin 抽取器入口:取 package 作命名空间并抽取类/接口/对象声明,且额外把带 @Composable 注解、名字以 Screen/Page 等结尾的顶层函数提升为 composable_function 节点,让 Compose UI 在以类为主的图中可见。
classes.description_en: Kotlin extractor entry: takes the package as namespace and extracts class/interface/object declarations, additionally surfacing top-level @Composable functions whose names end in Screen/Page/etc. as composable_function nodes so Compose UIs aren't invisible in a class-centric map.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: Lua 抽取器入口:由文件路径推命名空间,从 `require` 调用收集模块依赖,抽取顶层 function_definition_statement 并对带点/冒号的函数名取尾名作声明名。
classes.description_en: Lua extractor entry: derives namespace from file path, gathers module deps from `require` calls, and extracts top-level function_definition_statement nodes, taking the tail of dotted/colon function names as the declaration name.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: Objective-C 抽取器入口:从 #include/#import 收集依赖,先扫一遍 @implementation 以便同文件的 @interface 借用其调用边,抽取 class/protocol 并按选择子名建引用。
classes.description_en: Objective-C extractor entry: collects deps from #include/#import, first scans @implementation bodies so a same-file @interface can borrow their call-graph edges, then extracts classes/protocols with refs keyed off selector names.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: Python 抽取器入口:由文件路径(剥去 __init__)推命名空间,从 import/from-import 收集依赖,抽取模块级 class/function(含 decorated_definition),按下划线约定定可见性、调用名仅留短名留待跨模块解析。
classes.description_en: Python extractor entry: derives namespace from file path (stripping __init__), collects deps from import/from-import, and extracts module-level classes/functions (including decorated_definition), setting visibility by underscore convention and leaving call names as short names for later cross-module resolution.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: Rust 抽取器入口:由文件路径推命名空间,从 use 声明解析限定名与别名,因方法住在 impl 块外而先按类型聚合 impl 中的方法数,再抽取 struct/enum/trait/function 并回填 method_count。
classes.description_en: Rust extractor entry: derives namespace from file path, parses qualified names+aliases from use declarations, and because methods live outside the type in impl blocks it pre-tallies impl methods per type before extracting structs/enums/traits/functions and back-filling method_count.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: Swift 抽取器入口:由文件路径推命名空间,抽取 class/struct/enum/protocol,并把被解析成带 extension 关键字的 class_declaration 路由到扩展合并阶段,使扩展不与同名真实类型节点碰撞。
classes.description_en: Swift extractor entry: derives namespace from file path and extracts classes/structs/enums/protocols, routing class_declaration nodes that carry an `extension` keyword into an extension-merge pass so extensions don't collide with the real same-named type node.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: TypeScript/JavaScript 抽取器入口:用 tree-sitter 查询抽取类/接口/枚举/函数及方法,解析 import 与 re-export/桶文件说明符并记录引用边,为随后的 TS 模块解析提供最完整的导入/导出元数据。
classes.description_en: TypeScript/JavaScript extractor entry: extracts classes/interfaces/enums/functions and methods via tree-sitter queries, parses import and re-export/barrel specifiers, and records reference edges, supplying the richest import/export metadata for the subsequent TS module resolution.

classes.name: resolveProject
classes.description_zh: 语言无关的解析编排器:挑出 typescript 声明、加载 tsconfig,再委派给 resolveTs;无 TS 声明则原样返回(其它语言的短名引用留给 core.resolve)。
classes.description_en: Language-agnostic resolution orchestrator: filters out the typescript declarations, loads tsconfig, and delegates to resolveTs—returning empty when there are no TS decls (other languages' short-name refs are left for core.resolve).

classes.name: resolveSpecifier
classes.description_zh: 把模块说明符按优先级(相对路径→tsconfig paths 别名→baseUrl→external)解析到项目文件,探测 TS/JS 扩展名与目录 index,返回 {file,kind} 或 external/unresolved。
classes.description_en: Resolves a module specifier to a project file by priority (relative → tsconfig path aliases → baseUrl → external), probing TS/JS extensions and directory index, and returns {file,kind} or external/unresolved.

classes.name: loadTsconfig
classes.description_zh: 读取 tsconfig/jsconfig 的 compilerOptions.baseUrl 与 paths(容忍 JSONC、跟随相对 extends 且子覆盖基),为模块解析提供别名与基址。
classes.description_en: Reads compilerOptions.baseUrl and paths from tsconfig/jsconfig (JSONC-tolerant, following relative `extends` with child-overrides-base), supplying aliases and base path for module resolution.

classes.name: ownExportsByFile
classes.description_zh: 为每个文件构建其自身公开声明的『导出名→全限定名』表(跳过 private),是导出映射的基础层。
classes.description_en: Builds, per file, a map of its own public declarations' exportName→qualifiedName (skipping private ones), the base layer of the export maps.

classes.name: buildExportMaps
classes.description_zh: 在各文件自身导出之上做透传的再导出/桶文件展开(记忆化且防环),得到每个文件完整的『导出名→全限定名』映射。
classes.description_en: Expands transitive re-exports/barrels on top of each file's own exports (memoized and cycle-guarded) to produce each file's complete exportName→qualifiedName map.

classes.name: resolveOneRef
classes.signature: function resolveOneRef(short, file, ctx, scopes, exportMaps, ownExports, sameFileNames)

classes.name: resolveTs
classes.description_zh: TS/JS 引用解析主流程:借助导入作用域与导出映射把每条短名引用重写为高置信度全限定边,区分 same-file/import/barrel/alias 来源,未中者进审计并统计桶/别名展开。
classes.description_en: Main TS/JS reference-resolution pass: using per-file import scopes and export maps, rewrites each short-name ref into a high-confidence qualified edge (tagging same-file/import/barrel/alias provenance), audits misses, and tallies barrel/alias expansions.

layers.name: Graph Core
layers.summary_zh: 声明/依赖图核心数据结构、跨模块标签、git 元数据、版本
layers.summary_en: Core declaration/dependency graph, cross-module labels, git metadata, versioning

classes.name: isEntryPoint
classes.description_zh: 通过名称、后缀和路径等架构惯例启发式地判定一个声明是否为应用入口点,从而在重要性评分中赋予其角色权重。
classes.description_en: Heuristically identifies whether a declaration is an application entry point via naming, suffix, and path conventions, so the graph can grant it role-based importance weight.

classes.name: round3
classes.description_zh: 提供与 Python round() 一致的四舍五入到偶数策略,保证重要性分数序列化时在 Node 与原 Python 移植版本间逐位可复现。
classes.description_en: Provides Python-compatible round-half-to-even rounding so serialized importance scores remain bit-for-bit reproducible between the Node port and its original Python implementation.

classes.name: buildGraph
classes.description_zh: 图核心的核心构建器:将提取出的声明与继承/引用关系汇聚成去重的依赖边集,并据入度、出度与入口点角色计算每个节点的重要性权重。
classes.description_en: The Graph Core's central builder: assembles extracted declarations and their inherit/reference relations into a deduplicated dependency edge set and computes each node's importance from in-degree, out-degree, and entry-point role.

classes.name: resolve
classes.signature: function resolve(raw, byQname, byShort, srcDecl = null)

classes.name: toJsonShape
classes.signature: function toJsonShape(declarations, edges, layers, projectMeta, flows = null, layerGroups = null)

classes.name: isGitRepo
classes.description_zh: 防御性地探测目标仓库是否位于 git 工作树内,作为采集 git 溯源信息以标注 project.git 之前的安全前置判断。
classes.description_en: Defensively probes whether the target repository sits inside a git work tree, serving as the safe gate before reading git provenance to stamp project.git.

classes.name: assignDisplayNames
classes.description_zh: R3 跨模块显示名消歧的入口:当同一短名在多个模块中冲突时,按模块上下文与逐级修复规则为这些声明分配全局唯一的人类可读 display_name 标签。
classes.description_en: The entry point for R3 cross-module label disambiguation: when a bare name collides across modules, it assigns globally-unique human-facing display_name labels to those declarations via module context and tiered repair rules.

layers.name: View & Interaction
layers.summary_zh: 场景/节点/边渲染、分层与图布局、平移缩放交互、UI 面板、PNG 导出
layers.summary_en: Scene/node/edge rendering, layer & diagram layout, pan-zoom interaction, UI panels, PNG export

classes.name: createSelection
classes.description_zh: 创建轻量级选中/高亮子系统,绕过全量重渲染,仅切换节点 CSS 类并重绘选中切片的边,统一处理层模式(图邻居)与流程模式(序列/流水线穿过选中节点的连续链)的高亮语义。
classes.description_en: Factory for the lightweight selection/highlight subsystem that bypasses full re-render to toggle node classes and redraw only the selected slice's edges, unifying highlight semantics across layer mode (graph neighbours) and flow mode (the continuous chain running through the selected node).

classes.name: initTouchZoom
classes.description_zh: 在画布上挂接两指捏合缩放手势,把手指间距比映射到 zoom.js 的 zoomTo(以双指中点为锚),刻意只接管双指手势而把单指平移与点选留给原生滚动与点击。
classes.description_en: Wires two-finger pinch-to-zoom on the canvas, mapping the finger-distance ratio onto zoom.js's zoomTo anchored at the midpoint, deliberately capturing only the two-finger gesture so one-finger pan and tap-to-select stay native.

classes.name: layoutChild
classes.signature: function layoutChild(layer, x, width, contentTop, LAYOUT)

classes.name: layoutGrouped
classes.description_zh: 二维分组容器布局器,把独立叶层与按 order 排序的分组(行/列排布)摆成带框的画布带,复用 packRows 做层内打包,产出 bands/frames 几何供分组视图渲染。
classes.description_en: The 2D group-container layout engine that arranges standalone leaf layers and ordered groups (row/column) into framed canvas bands, reusing packRows for in-layer packing to emit the bands/frames geometry the grouped view renders.

classes.name: makeLayout
classes.description_zh: 按给定字号倍率从基准布局常量派生出一份新的 Layout 度量对象,重算所有对缩放敏感的尺寸字段,是缩放时整个布局子系统的尺寸真相来源。
classes.description_en: Derives a fresh Layout metrics object from the base constants for a given font scale, recomputing every scale-sensitive dimension to serve as the single source of sizing truth for the layout subsystem under zoom.

classes.name: labelWidth
classes.description_zh: 估算等宽字体下文本(含 CJK 双倍宽)的渲染像素宽,供布局算法为边/步骤标签预留间距以避免与盒子重叠。
classes.description_en: Estimates a label's rendered pixel width in the mono font with CJK glyphs counted double, so diagram layouts can size gaps that keep edge and step labels from overlapping boxes.

classes.name: nodeWidth
classes.description_zh: 依声明的显示标签自适应计算节点盒宽度(CJK 感知、加内边距、限最小值),使渲染器永不需要截断标签——这是“盒子自适应全标签”约定的尺寸基元。
classes.description_en: Computes a node box's width adaptively from its display label (CJK-aware, padded, min-clamped) so the renderer never truncates, embodying the box-fits-the-full-label convention.

classes.name: layoutPipeline
classes.description_zh: 为 Phase-2 编排的流水线流程图计算纯几何:统一节点宽、左右排列等高的 stage 列、按穿越标签宽度撑开列间距,产出 stages/nodes/links 坐标供流水线渲染器消费。
classes.description_en: Computes the pure geometry of a Phase-2-authored pipeline flow diagram — uniform node width, left-to-right equal-height stage columns, per-gap widths sized to crossing labels — emitting the stage/node/link coordinates the pipeline renderer consumes.

classes.name: buildPipelineContent
classes.signature: function buildPipelineContent(backend, lay, ctx, { appendNode, flowDecorate })
classes.description_zh: 把流水线布局结果渲染成 SVG:底层 stage 容器带标题、中层连线与标签、顶层节点盒,按 z 序分层装配到画布后端,是流水线流程图的 DOM 组装入口。
classes.description_en: Renders a pipeline layout into SVG by z-ordered layers — titled stage containers beneath, links and labels in the middle, node boxes on top — assembling the DOM for the pipeline flow diagram into the canvas backend.

classes.name: buildSequenceContent
classes.description_zh: 把时序图布局结果渲染成 SVG:底层生命线、中层带编号的步骤箭头与自调用回环、顶层参与者盒,是时序流程图的 DOM 组装入口。
classes.description_en: Renders a sequence-diagram layout into SVG — lifelines beneath, numbered step arrows and self-loops in the middle, participant boxes on top — assembling the DOM for the sequence flow diagram.

classes.name: buildLinkPath
classes.description_zh: 为流水线图任意方向的连线生成贝塞尔路径,对反向连线(目标在源左侧)做镜像处理,前向连线委托给标准流程边路径,是 Phase-2 自由连线的几何绘制器。
classes.description_en: Generates the Bézier path for a pipeline link in any direction, mirroring the curve for backward links (target left of source) and delegating forward ones to the standard flow-edge path, drawing Phase-2-authored free links.

classes.name: flowEdgeClass
classes.signature: function flowEdgeClass(kind, { active = false, dimmed = false } = {})
classes.description_zh: 为流程边 <path> 计算 CSS 类字符串(kind/dispatch/active/dimmed),是流程渲染器与选中重样式器共享的单一真相,保证选中时边的种类样式一致。
classes.description_en: Computes the CSS class string for a flow edge `<path>` (kind/dispatch/active/dimmed) as the single source of truth shared by the flow renderer and the selection re-styler, keeping edge styling consistent through selection.

classes.name: makeNodeEl
classes.description_zh: 为一个定位节点构建并装配 <g class="node"> SVG 元素——盒体、语言色条、不截断的标签、点击/悬停监听并完成注册,是层带与流程渲染器共用的节点 DOM 工厂。
classes.description_en: Builds and wires one positioned node's `<g class="node">` SVG element — box, language stripe, untruncated label, click/hover listeners, and registration — serving as the shared node-DOM factory for the layer-band and flow renderers.

classes.name: appendNode
classes.signature: function appendNode(st, group, n, ctx, decorateNode)

classes.name: renderApp
classes.description_zh: 渲染入口与 store 订阅者,依当前 activeView 从视图注册表选出层视图或流程视图,驱动共享的场景渲染生命周期,是整个视图层的总装配点。
classes.description_en: The render entry point and store subscriber that picks the layer or flow view from the registry by the active view and drives the shared scene-render lifecycle — the top assembly point of the whole view layer.

classes.name: formatBuildInfo
classes.description_zh: 把项目的 git 溯源(分支/提交/脏标记)、构建时间与架构评分格式化成构建徽章的紧凑文本与多行明细(双语),是构建信息徽章/弹窗的纯格式化数据源。
classes.description_en: Formats a project's git provenance (branch/commit/dirty), build time, and architecture score into the build badge's compact text and bilingual multi-line detail, serving as the pure data source for the build-info badge and popover.

classes.name: createBuildPopover
classes.description_zh: 创建构建徽章的点击弹窗控制器,以可选中的浮层(挂在 body 层避开 backdrop-filter 包含块问题)替代原生 title 提示,提供完整提交哈希、评分明细与一键复制。
classes.description_en: Creates the click-to-open popover controller for the build badge, replacing the native title tooltip with a selectable body-level overlay (avoiding the backdrop-filter containing-block trap) that shows the full commit hash, score breakdown, and one-click copy.

classes.name: initControls
classes.description_zh: 顶部/侧栏交互控件的总初始化器,接线分组(层/流程)切换、流程侧栏的选择与折叠展开、窗口缩放重布局等,把 UI 控件操作翻译成 store 状态变更与重渲染。
classes.description_en: The top-level initializer for the top/side interaction controls, wiring the layer-vs-flow grouping toggle, flow-sidebar selection and collapse/expand, and debounced resize re-layout, translating control actions into store state changes and re-renders.

classes.name: createDetail
classes.description_zh: 创建右侧声明详情面板渲染器,展示签名、标签、@path:line 深链复制、双语描述、元信息网格与依赖/被依赖边列表,并通过注入依赖处理边行目标的选中与滚动以避免循环引用。
classes.description_en: Creates the right-hand declaration detail-panel renderer showing signature, tags, the @path:line deep-link copy row, bilingual description, a meta grid, and depends-on/depended-on-by edge lists, taking edge-row target selection via injected deps to avoid import cycles.

classes.name: renderLangStats
classes.description_zh: 统计模型中各语言的声明数并按降序渲染成详情面板底部的彩色语言统计条,给出地图整体的语言构成一览。
classes.description_en: Tallies per-language declaration counts across the model and renders them descending into the colored language-stats bar pinned to the detail panel's footer, giving an at-a-glance view of the map's language composition.

classes.name: packRows
classes.signature: function packRows(sorted, innerLeft, innerW, contentTop, LAYOUT)
classes.description_zh: 纯几何打包器,把某层按重要性排好序的声明节点流式装入给定宽度的多行网格,返回相对坐标的定位节点与内容高度,是层带渲染器与分组渲染器共享的唯一行打包实现。
classes.description_en: The single shared row-packing primitive that flows a layer's importance-sorted nodes into a fixed-width multi-row grid, returning positioned nodes and content height for both the layer-band and grouped renderers to reuse.

layers.name: Data & State
layers.summary_zh: 数据加载、schema 校验、状态存储、设置、i18n、工具函数
layers.summary_en: Data loading, schema validation, state store, settings, i18n, utilities

classes.name: t
classes.description_zh: 作为静态 UI 文案的双语解析器,按当前语言从内置词典查键,缺失时回退英文、再回退键名本身,是整个视图固定界面字符串本地化的统一查表入口。
classes.description_en: Provides the bilingual resolver for static UI strings, looking a key up in the built-in dictionary for the active language with fallback to English and then the raw key, serving as the single lookup point for the viewer's fixed interface text.

classes.name: pickBilingual
classes.description_zh: 作为全视图双语取值的单一事实源,优先取配对字段 `<base>_zh`/`<base>_en` 并按语言择一(缺一半退另一半),无配对时退回拆分旧式拼接串再退单语裸串,保证语言切换的正确性。
classes.description_en: Is the single source of truth for bilingual value resolution across the viewer, preferring the paired `<base>_zh`/`<base>_en` fields (falling back to the other half when one is missing), then splitting legacy combined strings, then a bare monolingual value, so language toggling stays correct everywhere.

classes.name: setState
classes.description_zh: 作为中央响应式状态库的唯一结构化写入口,把补丁合并进全局 state 并经 requestAnimationFrame 合批调度一次订阅者通知,使每帧最多触发一次全量重渲染。
classes.description_en: Is the sole structural mutation entry of the central reactive store, merging a patch into the global state and scheduling a single rAF-coalesced notify so subscribers (full re-render) fire at most once per frame.

classes.name: escapeHtml
classes.description_zh: 作为视图层 HTML 注入的安全基元,把任意值转义为可安全插入 HTML 文本的串(空值产出空串),被卡片/详情等所有手拼 HTML 处复用以防 XSS。
classes.description_en: Provides the viewer's HTML-injection safety primitive, escaping any value into a string safe to interpolate as HTML text (nullish yields empty), reused by every hand-built HTML site (cards, detail) to prevent XSS.

classes.name: validateDiagram
classes.description_zh: 作为流程图注解层的结构校验器,针对 pipeline/sequence 两类图核对阶段/参与者/链接的 id 唯一性、节点归属、双语标签齐全等约束,只收集错误而绝不抛异常,为「宁可漏渲染也不误识」提供判据。
classes.description_en: Acts as the structural validator for the flow-diagram annotation layer, checking pipeline/sequence diagrams for id uniqueness, node membership, and complete bilingual labels while never throwing (only collecting errors), giving callers a basis to miss rather than misidentify.

classes.name: diagramOf
classes.description_zh: 作为流程图渲染的准入闸门,仅当流程的 diagram 通过完整校验时返回该图、否则返回 null,使无效或缺失图的流程被安全排除(回退而非误画)。
classes.description_en: Serves as the admission gate for flow-diagram rendering, returning a flow's diagram only when it passes full validation and null otherwise, so invalid or absent diagrams are safely excluded (fall back rather than mis-draw).

classes.name: buildFlowIndex
classes.description_zh: 作为流程模式的数据装配步骤,过滤出仅带有效 pipeline/sequence 图的流程建成 id→flow 索引,并据当前 activeFlow 是否仍存在解析出默认选中流程 id,供流程视图初始化。
classes.description_en: Performs the data-assembly step for flow mode, filtering to only flows carrying a valid pipeline/sequence diagram to build the id→flow index and resolving the default flow id (keeping the current activeFlow if still present, else the first flow) for the flow view to initialize on.

classes.name: dataUrl
classes.description_zh: 作为画廊契约的数据定址核心,把数据文件名解析为 URL:无 `?project=` 时取本地服务根的 `/name`(单项目模式不变),有 slug 时解析为相对查看器页的 `../data/<slug>/name`,以适配任意部署基路径。
classes.description_en: Is the core of the gallery data-locating contract, resolving a data filename to its URL — `/name` at the server root when no `?project=` is present (single-project mode unchanged), or the viewer-relative `../data/<slug>/name` when a slug is given, so it works under any deployment base path.

classes.name: isGallery
classes.description_zh: 作为运行模式判别开关,依据 `?project=<slug>` 是否存在判定查看器处于多项目画廊模式,被加载层用来决定数据按发布静态可缓存取还是本地服务时绕过缓存以拾取重建。
classes.description_en: Acts as the runtime-mode discriminator, deciding whether the viewer is in multi-project gallery mode by the presence of `?project=<slug>`, consumed by the load layer to choose browser-cacheable fetching (static per-publish) versus cache-bypass for local serving's rebuild pickup.

classes.name: assertInv1
classes.description_zh: 作为客户端 INV-1 不变量守卫,在每个分层内扫描实际渲染的核心节点,检出同一层中标签重名的声明并产出违例,保证图中每个节点标签在其分层内唯一可辨。
classes.description_en: Serves as the client-side INV-1 guard, scanning each layer's actually-rendered core nodes to surface declarations whose labels collide within that layer, so every node label stays uniquely identifiable inside its band.

classes.name: assertInvU1
classes.description_zh: 作为 INV-U1 几何不变量,用与渲染器同源的 metrics 计算把布局将采用的节点框宽与标签所需宽度的独立下界对比,一旦节点框窄于完整标签即报违例,防止截断帽悄悄回归。
classes.description_en: Implements the INV-U1 geometry invariant, comparing the box width the layout will use against an independent label-width lower bound computed from the same metrics the renderer uses, firing whenever a node box is too narrow for its full label so width caps can't silently regress.

classes.name: collectViolations
classes.description_zh: 作为客户端不变量校验的统一聚合入口,在地图加载时依次运行 INV-1/INV-U1/INV-B1 三项断言并合并违例列表,供视图层在载入即时自检模型健康。
classes.description_en: Acts as the single aggregation entry for client-side invariant checking, running the INV-1/INV-U1/INV-B1 assertions in sequence and merging their violations so the viewer can self-audit model health at load time.

layer_groups.name: Build Pipeline
layer_groups.summary_zh: Node 分析管线：抽取声明、构建依赖图、分层、发现流程、评分、出图
layer_groups.summary_en: Node analysis pipeline: extract declarations, build the graph, layer, find flows, score, diagram

layer_groups.name: Interactive Viewer
layer_groups.summary_zh: 零依赖静态浏览器查看器，渲染分层架构图与业务流程图
layer_groups.summary_en: Dependency-free static browser viewer rendering the layered map and flow diagrams

flows.description_zh: 一次构建的主入口:遍历项目、按语言分派抽取器、解析模块引用、消歧跨模块标签,最终写出 raw_structure.json。
flows.description_en: The main build pass: walk the project, dispatch per-language extractors, resolve module references, disambiguate cross-module labels, and emit raw_structure.json.

flows.description_zh: TypeScript 抽取器装载 WASM 语法、遍历语法树、抽取声明、收集引用与导入,产出统一的 ParseResult。
flows.description_en: The TypeScript extractor loads the WASM grammar, walks the syntax tree, extracts declarations, collects references and imports, and emits a uniform ParseResult.

links.label_zh: 已编译查询 + 语法树

flows.description_zh: 确定性架构评分:构建评分视图后分别打 L(分层)、Dq(依赖)、H(卫生)三维度,再合成 total = round(D × E),可选有界 AI 调整。
flows.description_en: Deterministic architecture scoring: build the scoring view, score the L (layering), Dq (dependencies) and H (hygiene) dimensions, then combine into total = round(D × E) with an optional bounded AI adjustment.

flows.description_zh: 把 /code-map:chat 记录的接地编辑(分层移动、自定义流程、描述覆盖)逐条与新构建的地图对账并去重后重新施加,使其在每次重建后存活。
flows.description_en: Re-applies the grounded edits recorded by /code-map:chat (layer moves, authored flows, description overrides) by reconciling each against the freshly built map and deduping, so they survive every rebuild.

steps.label_zh: 引用的声明/流是否仍存在?

flows.description_zh: 构建后的硬性闸门:对地图运行 INV-1(标签唯一)、INV-U1(盒宽几何)、INV-B1(双语完整)三项断言,任一违例即以非零退出码使构建失败。
flows.description_en: The post-build hard gate: runs the INV-1 (label uniqueness), INV-U1 (box-width geometry) and INV-B1 (bilingual completeness) assertions over the map, failing the build with a non-zero exit code on any violation.

flows.description_zh: 状态库变更触发渲染入口:按当前视图选层视图或流程视图,经场景测量布局、绘制节点与边/流程图,并在选中时更新详情面板。
flows.description_en: A store change drives the render entry: pick the layer or flow view, measure & lay out the scene, draw nodes and edges/diagrams, and update the detail panel on selection.

steps.label_zh: 状态变更通知(rAF 合批)
按 activeView 选层/流视图
